pacing.routeGoal: Bosch leaves home, crosses hostile ground, reaches Relay Yard, and realizes the Milady machine has to be fought rather than joined.

segments.label: Name The Signal
segments.proof: Intro naming hands off to the browser overworld.

segments.label: Bedroom To Block
segments.proof: Bedroom poster, home exit, and neighborhood kid establish the route.

segments.label: Corner Shop Prep
segments.proof: Pocket Snack, Signal Patch, and route economy are shop-proven.

segments.label: Signal Park Checkpoint
segments.proof: Checkpoint, Ushanka Shade, shield, status, and reward pacing are smoke-proven.

segments.label: Underpass Cache
segments.proof: Underpass cache, wall collision, Focus Fizz, Big Snack, and Returnless King are smoke-proven.

segments.label: Milady Relay Yard
segments.proof: Final relay interaction closes the current playable route.

inventoryUi.title: Stuff
inventoryUi.noUseText: This is important, but Bosch cannot use it from Stuff yet.

keyItems.name: Route Brief
keyItems.label: Route Brief
keyItems.description: Bosch's opening route note. It is already open when he wakes, turning a bedroom morning into a town-scale anomaly.

keyItems.name: Proof-Token Charm
keyItems.label: Proof-Token Charm
keyItems.description: A warm home-token from the entry bowl. It binds the chosen name and sprite variant before Bosch leaves the house, unlocks Receipt Routers, and makes the signal-pet stand down.

keyItems.name: Practice Bat
keyItems.label: Practice Bat
keyItems.description: A starter bat from the side room: not proof, not status, just something solid Bosch chose himself before stepping into rumor.

keyItems.name: Public Version Card
keyItems.label: Public Version Card
keyItems.description: A cheap laminated card showing the version of Bosch the town is already repeating. It works like a bad local ID.

keyItems.name: Hot Wallet proof token
keyItems.label: Hot Wallet proof token
keyItems.description: A portable token from Sal's kiosk. It turns the witness trail into something a civic machine will at least pretend to read.

keyItems.name: Gate Classifier Receipt
keyItems.label: Gate Classifier Receipt
keyItems.description: The Station Gate's printed classification of Bosch's public version. Like a key, but more embarrassing.

keyItems.name: Damaged Public Version Card
keyItems.label: Damaged Public Version Card
keyItems.description: The public-version card after Malady cracks it into evidence. The damage makes the fake harder to file and easier to remember.

shop.title: Corner Shop
shop.subtitle: Counter snacks
shop.alreadyOwnedText: Bosch cannot carry more of those yet.
shop.insufficientText: Bosch does not have enough Swag for that yet.
shop.purchaseText: It slides into Stuff for the route.

items.name: Pocket Snack
items.label: Pocket Snack
items.useText: Bosch eats the Pocket Snack. The route noise gets quieter.
items.fullText: Bosch feels steady already. Save the snack for later.
items.description: A shelf-stable route snack in a signal-blue wrapper. Restores 8 HP from Stuff.

items.name: Signal Patch
items.label: Signal Patch
items.useText: Bosch slaps on a Signal Patch. The next hit gets softened.
items.fullText: The patch is for battle pressure, not walking around.
items.description: A disposable signal patch. In battle it reduces the next enemy hit by 4.

items.name: Focus Fizz
items.label: Focus Fizz
items.useText: Bosch drinks the Focus Fizz and catches the beat.
items.fullText: Bosch is already holding enough signal charge.
items.description: A bright shop drink. In battle it grants one focus charge.

shops.title: Downtown Cart
shops.speaker: Downtown Cart
shops.subtitle: Sidewalk supplies
shops.alreadyOwnedText: Bosch cannot carry more from this cart yet.
shops.insufficientText: The cart waves off the empty-wallet routine.

items.name: Pocket Snack
items.label: Pocket Snack
items.useText: Bosch eats the Pocket Snack. The route noise gets quieter.
items.fullText: Bosch feels steady already. Save the snack for later.
items.description: A shelf-stable route snack in a signal-blue wrapper. Restores 8 HP from Stuff.

items.name: Focus Fizz
items.label: Focus Fizz
items.useText: Bosch drinks the Focus Fizz and catches the beat.
items.fullText: Bosch is already holding enough signal charge.
items.description: A bright shop drink. In battle it grants one focus charge.

shops.title: Underpass Cache
shops.speaker: Underpass Cache
shops.subtitle: Relay supplies
shops.alreadyOwnedText: Bosch cannot carry more from this cache yet.
shops.insufficientText: The cache wants more Swag than Bosch has.
shops.purchaseText: The cache clicks shut after handing it over.

items.name: Big Snack
items.label: Big Snack
items.useText: Bosch eats the Big Snack. The route noise drops hard.
items.fullText: Bosch should save the Big Snack for a real hit.
items.description: A heavier route snack from the underpass cache. Restores 12 HP in battle or from Stuff.

items.name: Focus Fizz
items.label: Focus Fizz
items.useText: Bosch drinks the Focus Fizz and catches the beat.
items.fullText: Bosch is already holding enough signal charge.
items.description: A bright shop drink. In battle it grants one focus charge.
